data.name: Required.UserId
data.value: User ID is required.

data.name: Required.MovieId
data.value: Movie ID is required.

data.name: Required.Email
data.value: Email is required.

data.name: Required.Username
data.value: Username is required.

data.name: Required.Password
data.value: Password is required.

data.name: Required.FirstName
data.value: First name is required.

data.name: Required.LastName
data.value: Last name is required.

data.name: Required.Title
data.value: Title is required.

data.name: Required.Content
data.value: Content is required.

data.name: Required.Name
data.value: Name is required.

data.name: Required.ReviewId
data.value: Review ID is required.

data.name: Required.CommentId
data.value: Comment ID is required.

data.name: Length.Username
data.value: Username must be between 3 and 50 characters.

data.name: Length.Password
data.value: Password must be at least 6 characters.

data.name: Length.FirstName
data.value: First name must be between 2-50 characters.

data.name: Length.LastName
data.value: Last name must be between 2-50 characters.

data.name: Length.Bio
data.value: Bio can be at most 500 characters.

data.name: Length.Title
data.value: Title must be between 5 and 200 characters.

data.name: Length.Content.Review
data.value: Review content must be between 10 and 2000 characters.

data.name: Length.Content.Comment
data.value: Comment must be between 2 and 500 characters.

data.name: Length.Name.MovieList
data.value: List name must be between 1 and 100 characters.

data.name: Length.Description.MovieList
data.value: Description cannot exceed 500 characters.

data.name: Format.Email
data.value: Please enter a valid email address.

data.name: Format.Username
data.value: Username can only contain letters, numbers, and underscores.

data.name: Format.Password
data.value: Password must contain at least one lowercase letter, one uppercase letter, and one number.

data.name: Range.Rating
data.value: Rating must be between 1 and 10.

data.name: Valid.ReactionType
data.value: Please select a valid reaction type.

data.name: Valid.ReactionType.UpvoteDownvote
data.value: Reaction type can only be upvote or downvote.
